profession_discipline: stores, hearth allotments, and local provisioning
public_reputation: Known around Hearthcoil Commune through steady work as a commune quartermaster.
manner: Carries role-shaped habits that make local pressure visible in the way they speak and judge strangers. In Hearthcoil Commune, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of a commune quartermaster in and around Hearthcoil Commune, keeping ordinary obligations from turning into public disorder.
current_agenda: Keep Hearthcoil Commune workable by absorbing local strain before it becomes a visible scandal, shutdown, or breach of order.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of commune quartermaster credible while managing pressure tied to status, access, logistics, and local reputation in Hearthcoil Commune.

adventure_hooks.summary: Cadrin Crestmark can draw the party into a locality problem centered on quartermaster hale rimevault duties in Hearthcoil Commune.
Cadrin Crestmark becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with coil failure, ration conflict, out-migration around Hearthcoil Commune.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Cadrin Crestmark is immediately readable as a quartermaster hale rimevault tied to Hearthcoil Commune.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Hearthcoil Commune: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Cadrin Crestmark presents as someone shaped by the duties of a commune quartermaster and the daily pressures of Hearthcoil Commune.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a commune quartermaster, and proof that strangers will not make Hearthcoil Commune harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Cadrin Crestmark refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a quartermaster hale rimevault too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Cadrin Crestmark adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Cadrin Crestmark always knows more about Hearthcoil Commune than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a commune quartermaster in Hearthcoil Commune.
